title: centranthera cochinchinensis var. lutea
intro: Centranthera cochinchinensis var. lutea, also known as the yellow centranthera, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Centranthera cochinchinensis var. lutea can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
